ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider (e.g., Metro Transit) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the provider */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the provider */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the provider was established */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider managing the route */,
  "route_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the route type */,
  "route_classification" INTEGER /* Reference to the route classification */,
  "schedule" INTEGER /* Reference to the schedule type */,
  "route_number" INTEGER /* Number of the route */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the route (e.g., East, West) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the route operates */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the first trip on the route */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the last trip on the route */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of trips (e.g., every 15 minutes) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the vehicles on the route */,
  "route_length" REAL /* Length of the route in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_route_classification FOREIGN KEY ("route_classification") REFERENCES route_classifications ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_schedule FOREIGN KEY ("schedule") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_route_type FOREIGN KEY ("route_type") REFERENCES route_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route the stop belongs to */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site ID of the stop */,
  "geo_node_name" TEXT /* Name of the stop (e.g., Hennepin Ave & Franklin Ave / 22nd St) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the stop */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the stop */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the stop */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the stop */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the stop along the route */,
  "stop_type" TEXT /* Type of stop (e.g., bus stop, light rail station) */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility information (e.g., wheelchair accessible) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available at the stop (e.g., shelter, bench, Wi-Fi) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES site_info ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route the trip belongs to */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips scheduled */,
  "observed_trips" INTEGER /* Number of trips observed */,
  "sample_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of trips sampled */,
  "downtown" TEXT /* Indicates if the trip is downtown (Y/N) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle used for the trip */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver for the trip */,
  "delay_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the trip was delayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger count */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trip the count belongs to */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stop the count belongs to */,
  "onboard_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers boarding at the stop */,
  "offboard_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers alighting at the stop */,
  "count_date" TEXT /* Date of the count */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the count was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_counts_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_counts_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stop the comment is associated with (optional) */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route the comment is associated with (optional) */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment or note */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., maintenance, feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_info" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the site */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the site */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the site */,
  "parking_info" TEXT /* Information about parking availability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the route type (e.g., Urban Local) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route type */,
  "min_speed" REAL /* Minimum speed of the route type */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of the route type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the route classification (e.g., Core Local) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route classification */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Priority level of the route classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule type */,
  "schedule_name" TEXT /* Name of the schedule type (e.g., Weekday) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the schedule type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the schedule */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the schedule */,
  "recurrence" TEXT /* Recurrence pattern of the schedule (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)
